subject: Add validation for int and float constraints
commit_message:

Issue-ID: SDC-4316
Signed-off-by: eschcam <cameron.scholes@est.tech>

Patch Set 7: Code-Review-1

please reuse catalog-ui/src/app/utils/validation-utils.ts (if possible), instead of implementing new one

Patch Set 7:

> Patch Set 7: Code-Review-1
> 
> please reuse catalog-ui/src/app/utils/validation-utils.ts (if possible), instead of implementing new one

I don't think this module is compatible with Angular Components. 
Either that or I am missing something

Patch Set 7:

If my research is correct ValidationUtils was written for Angular 1 while the constraint component was written for Angular 2.
ValidationUtils would most likely have to be upgraded to an Angular 2 service to be compatible with this component
Description of patch set 8 set to "Use RegEx for validation"
